description: Section 2: Deterministic guardrails. Iter 1: reasoning emits code with parse_with_retry + dedup ring. First llm_query returns malformed JSON, retry prompt sent, second llm_query returns valid JSON. Also tests DeduplicationRing across records. Iter 2: reasoning verifies self-healing worked and dedup stats, returns FINAL.

parts.text:
Sure! Here's the classification:
{label: medication, confidence: 0.9, reasoning: common OTC drug

The self-healing retry loop worked correctly:
- First LLM response was malformed JSON (missing quotes, no closing brace)
- Correction prompt was sent with the error details
- Second response was valid JSON that parsed into ClassificationResult
- Dedup ring correctly identified 2 duplicates out of 5 records

FINAL(parse_with_retry self-healed: label=medication conf=0.92. Dedup: 2 unique from 5 with 3 skipped.)

expected.final_answer: parse_with_retry self-healed: label=medication conf=0.92. Dedup: 2 unique from 5 with 3 skipped.
